stemHtml: In the pre-flight phase, the captain notices that his/her co-pilot on the one hand is rather inexperienced and insecure but on the other hand highly motivated. What kind of leadership behaviour is most likely inappropriate?

options.a: The captain flies the first leg by himself and explains each action to the co-pilot in order to keep him informed about his decisions.
options.b: The captain lets the co-pilot fly and encourages him frankly to ask for any support when needed.
options.c: The captain lets the co-pilot fly and observes his behaviour without any comments.
options.d: The captain lets the co-pilot fly and gives him detailed instructions what to do.
